name: Rack of Lamb with Herbed Mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients in a container of an electric blender.
2. Process for 15 seconds or until smooth.
3. Add olive oil to the mustard mixture, one drop at a time.
4. Process on low speed until light and creamy.
5. Place the lamb, fat side up, on a rack in a shallow roasting pan.
6. Insert a meat thermometer into the lamb.
7. Brush the mustard mixture over the lamb.
8. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour and 20-30 minutes, or until the meat thermometer registers 160 degrees Fahrenheit.
